reference: Hello, this has been diagnosed as 'abyantara shotha' in Ayurveda. Please undergo virechana treatment, and you will also be able to reduce your weight. Contact +nine hundred and nineteen billion, nine hundred and sixty-four million, two hundred and seventy-eight thousand, eight hundred.
text: Hello, this has been diagnosed as Abhyantara Shoka in Ayurveda. Please undergo Virechana treatment, and you will also be able to reduce your weight. Contact nine hundred and nineteen billion, nine hundred and sixty-four million, two hundred and seventy-eight thousand, eight hundred.
